title: Moving around without the mouse
drDigitalIntro: You can move around the screen using just the keyboard. Press Tab to jump to the next button or box, press Shift+Tab to jump back to the previous one, and use the arrow keys to move through text or lists. It's faster than reaching for the trackpad every time!
drDigitalSuccess: Now you can get around hands-on-keyboard — Tab forward, Shift+Tab back!
drDigitalHint: Read through the navigation keys, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
